title: Sort Lessons by Sequence Attribute in Help Popout
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing lessons, I want the lessons to be displayed in their correct curriculum sequence, so that I can follow the training in the intended order.
description:
Lessons in the help popout Lessons tab are appearing out of order. They need to be sorted by the `_sequence` attribute from the WordPress JSON API in ascending order.

## Fix
Sort the lessons array by the `_sequence` field in ascending order before rendering.
acceptance_criteria: Lessons are displayed in ascending order based on the _sequence attribute
All lessons maintain their correct curriculum order
ux_changes: Lessons in the help popout now display in correct curriculum order, sorted by the _sequence attribute.
implementation_notes: Added ascending sort on _sequence field when rendering the lessons list from the WordPress JSON response.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the ascending sort on _sequence and submitted for review.
